summary: Onboard the new 'payouts-v2' ledger service into the reconciliation pipeline: wire the outbound event, update the reconciler query set, and publish the SDK client so internal callers can stop reading the legacy v1 tables directly.

affected_repos.name: pi-payouts-service
affected_repos.reason: Emits the new PayoutFinalized event + exposes the v2 read API.

affected_repos.name: pi-reconciler
affected_repos.reason: Consumes the event; v1 query path needs to be replaced with v2.

affected_repos.name: pi-internal-sdk
affected_repos.reason: Publishes the typed client so internal services can migrate off v1.

gaps.question: Should v1 reads continue during the migration window or be hard-cut over?
gaps.status: resolved: soft-cutover, keep v1 read for 30 days behind a feature flag

gaps.question: Who owns dashboard updates for the new event pipeline?
gaps.status: resolved: payouts team owns until GA, reconciler team takes over after

tasks.title: Define PayoutFinalized v2 event schema
tasks.description: Introduce the v2 event DTO with explicit currency, settlement_ref, and ledger_id. Backwards-compatible field ordering; do not rename v1 fields inline.

tasks.title: Emit the event from the finalization path
tasks.description: Publish PayoutFinalized v2 alongside the existing v1 event behind the dual_emit feature flag. v1 remains the default until reconciler flips over.

tasks.title: Expose v2 read endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /v2/payouts/{id} returning the ledger-linked shape. Reuse the existing auth middleware. Paginate where applicable.

tasks.title: Consume PayoutFinalized v2 event
tasks.description: Add a v2 consumer path alongside v1. Behind flag reconciler.v2_read, read ledger_id instead of joining through the legacy table.

tasks.title: Replace v1 query with v2 ledger lookup
tasks.description: Implement the v2 lookup using the ledger_id carried on the event. Keep v1 join as fallback until the feature flag flips after a 30-day bake.

tasks.title: Generate typed v2 client from v2 OpenAPI spec
tasks.description: Run the spec-to-client generator; wire the module export. Keep the v1 client exported side-by-side.

tasks.title: Publish pre-release on the internal npm registry
tasks.description: Bump the pre-release tag, update CHANGELOG, and publish behind the 'next' dist-tag so early adopters can pin without breaking consumers.
tasks.validation: bun run build && bun run publish:dry
